# altor-vec

> Client-side vector search for JavaScript. 54KB gzipped WASM. Sub-millisecond latency. HNSW algorithm. Runs entirely in the browser — no server, no API keys, no per-query billing. MIT licensed.

## Product
- [Homepage](https://altorlab.dev/): altor-vec overview, live demo, benchmarks, and API reference
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/altor-vec): npm install altor-vec
- [GitHub](https://github.com/Altor-lab/altor-vec): Source code, MIT license

## Blog — Technical Guides
- [Add Semantic Search in 5 Minutes](https://altorlab.dev/blog/semantic-search-website.html)
- [Vector Search Without a Backend](https://altorlab.dev/blog/vector-search-without-backend.html)
- [Build a JavaScript Vector Search Engine](https://altorlab.dev/blog/build-javascript-vector-search-engine.html)
- [Build a Vector Search Engine in JavaScript](https://altorlab.dev/blog/build-vector-search-engine-javascript.html)
- [Build a Semantic Search Engine in JavaScript](https://altorlab.dev/blog/build-semantic-search-engine-javascript.html)
- [Browser-Based RAG Tutorial](https://altorlab.dev/blog/browser-rag-tutorial.html)
- [HNSW Algorithm Explained](https://altorlab.dev/blog/hnsw-algorithm-explained.html)
- [Vector Search in React](https://altorlab.dev/blog/vector-search-react.html)
- [Client-Side Vector Search Guide](https://altorlab.dev/blog/client-side-vector-search-guide.html)
- [Offline-First Search](https://altorlab.dev/blog/offline-first-search.html)
- [Embedding-Based Autocomplete](https://altorlab.dev/blog/embedding-autocomplete-browser.html)
- [Cosine vs Euclidean Distance in JavaScript](https://altorlab.dev/blog/cosine-similarity-vs-euclidean-distance-javascript.html)
- [Algolia Alternative: Open Source Search for Developers in 2026](https://altorlab.dev/blog/algolia-alternative-open-source.html)
- [fuse.js Alternative: Semantic Search for What fuse.js Gets Wrong](https://altorlab.dev/blog/fuse-js-alternative.html)
- [Add Semantic Search to a Next.js App Router Project](https://altorlab.dev/blog/add-search-to-nextjs.html)
